positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic nocturnal forest scene. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna (moths, glowing mushrooms, gentle river reflections). Use a high-contrast, flat graphic art style with clean, sharp edges, emphasizing strong, deep silhouettes against a gradient background of midnight indigo and ethereal teal. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a single print placement on apparel. The overall mood should be magical, serene, and highly detailed, like a vintage nature lithograph meets modern graphic design.
negative: low quality, blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, deformed, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, realistic photo
